408","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔老道，逻辑清晰，希望作者大大继续按照自己的大纲好好写，精雕细琢，不要被一些喜欢爽文的带了节奏，慢一点点没关系，关键是要写的合理写好，加油加油加油[赞][赞][赞][赞][吃瓜]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1651536643,"group_id":"7005106440989838336","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7SBBc4z3/NCBrynqHx131c=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789360&x-signature=kF0qy%2FZCs5KDejK6auO%2FMmXI91c%3D","user_id":"73842986354","user_name":"爱吃韭菜煎饼果子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"73842986354","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1725063604,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7005106440989838336","book_info":{"abstract":"庙堂之上，朽木为官，殿陛之间，禽兽食禄，狼心狗行之辈，滚滚当道。

422254478120","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的一本书，不要因为书名感觉这本书很low，无论是作者的文笔还是思路，都是番茄那些爽文作者比不了的，而且可以深切的感受到作者在认真写，努力的作者应该得到赞扬，而且别看是一本网文，但是在写小说的同时作者也会给读者们普及许多的小知识，也让我认识了许多我从未听闻过的大宋有气节之人，起初看这本书是因为感觉题材不错，我就生活在徽钦二帝被囚禁的县城，我也进五国头城（徽钦二帝被囚禁的地方）参观过，试问哪个中华男儿不想抹去这历史上的靖康耻，最后总的来说真的是一本不错的书，喜欢历史的读者可以试着读一下"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1678115871,"group_id":"7005106440989838336","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"hhhhhhhhhhhh","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+HFP80ZYSeqGL0No/omEsY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1b4af13df1cb4ba3895777f3c5fa7925~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791703&x-signature=pYNo1631bsjCennnQ9ajzlcibRg%3D","user_id":"104510433016","user_name":"情字最杀人."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104510433016","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7005106440989838336","book_info":{"abstract":"庙堂之上，朽木为官，殿陛之间，禽兽食禄，狼心狗行之辈，滚滚当道。
